basics.name: Vinit Sutar
basics.title: Lead Data Scientist & AI Architect
basics.summary: Versatile Lead Data Scientist and AI Architect with 6+ years of experience building scalable machine learning and Generative AI pipelines. Expert in orchestrating multi-agent systems, production-grade RAG, and deterministic tool-calling (Claude Sonnet, Gemma 3, Llama 3.3) on AWS Bedrock and Azure Databricks.

highlights: Architected end-to-end LLM system for Pre-Game Watchability Index across 14 geographies for Amazon Prime Video Marketing
Engineered Strands agent data ingestion pipeline aggregating ELO scores, team form, head-to-head metrics, and 5-year fan sentiment
Reduced model complexity by consolidating to single Claude Sonnet model with custom deterministic scoring rubric
Directed AI-assisted frontend using KIRO agent for real-time LLM observability dashboard on serverless AWS stack
Integrated Claude Code with custom skill sets via Repowise to reduce per-task token costs
Led team of 5 Data Scientists, upskilling them in GenAI architectures and advanced ML techniques
Improved Propensity Models increasing FD conversions by ₹520 Crores
Implemented Market Mix Modelling saving 5% on marketing spend
Engineered RAG pipeline on Azure Databricks with HNSW indexing and Tool Calling with Gemma 3
Developed GLMNET and Logistic Regression attribution models with 98% accuracy
Implemented 2^(n-1) fractional factorial designs halving RCT time
Built propensity score matching pipeline (DTW, LSH, Faiss) for 200k stores
Modernised Prophet pipeline improving regression accuracy by 3%
Designed DTW-based store clustering improving imputation from 0.3% to 0.7%
Mentored team of two on inventory pipelines
Improved micro-organism detection accuracy by 40% using OpenCV
Developed annotation pipeline saving INR 80/image for 500 images across 15 species
Implemented Active Learning using Mask R-CNN saving ₹6,00,000
Increased accuracy from 80% to 94% while saving ₹1,00,000 in instrument costs

projects.name: Pre-Game Watchability Index
projects.description: End-to-end LLM system computing watchability scores for 14 geographies, improving ad-placement targeting for Amazon Prime Video Marketing.
projects.impact: Multi-agent pipeline with Claude Sonnet 4.6, reduced inference costs via model consolidation

projects.description: High-scale RAG pipeline on Azure Databricks with HNSW indexing, enabling Tool Calling capabilities with Gemma 3 for precise information retrieval.
projects.impact: 10,000+ daily queries with <2s response time, 94% accuracy

projects.impact: ₹520 Crores incremental revenue, 5% marketing cost savings

projects.impact: 3% accuracy improvement, imputation improved from 0.3% to 0.7%
